issues.title: canonical circuit breaker remains the only current-live deployment blocker
issues.action: Keep breaker-first truth on hb_predict_probe.py, live_decision_quality_drilldown.py, /lab, /execution/status, and current-state docs until recent 50 reaches at least 15 wins and streak falls below 50.

issues.title: q15 exact support remains under minimum under breaker (0/50)
issues.action: Keep support_route_verdict/support_progress/minimum_support_rows/gap_to_minimum visible in probe/API/UI/docs even when circuit_breaker_active is the primary blocker.

issues.title: venue readiness is still unverified
issues.action: Keep per-venue blockers explicitly visible on Dashboard, /lab, and /execution/status until credentials, order ack lifecycle, and fill lifecycle each have runtime-backed proof.

issues.title: fin_netflow remains source_auth_blocked because COINGLASS_API_KEY is missing
issues.action: Configure COINGLASS_API_KEY, then keep heartbeat collection running until successful ETF-flow snapshots replace auth_missing rows and coverage starts to move.

issues.title: model stability still needs work (cv=0.6076, cv_std=0.1254, cv_worst=0.4450)
issues.action: 優先比較 support-aware / shrinkage profiles 與 current bucket robustness，避免把治理 blocker 誤當單純 parity 問題。

issues.title: 連續 242 筆 1440m simulated_pyramid_win=0
issues.action: 檢查 recent canonical labels / regime breakdown / circuit breaker；必要時升級為 distribution-aware drift 調查

issues.title: recent canonical window 100 rows = distribution_pathology
issues.action: 直接對 recent canonical rows 做 feature variance / distinct-count / target-path drill-down；維持 decision-quality guardrails，並檢查 calibration scope 是否仍被病態 slice 稀釋。 recent_window=100, alerts=['constant_target', 'regime_concentration', 'regime_shift'], win_rate=0.0000, delta_vs_full=-0.6315, dominant_regime=bull(100.00%), interpretation=distribution_pathology, avg_pnl=-0.0095, avg_quality=-0.2877, avg_dd_penalty=0.3868, spot_long_win_rate=0.0000, feature_diag=variance:27/56, frozen:1, compressed:26, expected_static:1, overlay_only:4, unexpected_frozen:0, distinct:11, null_heavy:10, tail_streak=100x0 since 2026-04-17 19:53:47.553832 -> 2026-04-18 03:16:11.524145, adverse_streak=100x0 since 2026-04-17 19:53:47.553832 -> 2026-04-18 03:16:11.524145, prev_win_rate=0.0, delta_vs_prev=0.0, prev_quality=-0.2838, quality_delta_vs_prev=-0.0039, prev_pnl=-0.0106, pnl_delta_vs_prev=0.0011, top_shift_examples=feat_4h_vol_ratio(1.4859→0.1997,Δσ=2.3007)/feat_mind(0.0354→-0.0011,Δσ=0.7421)/feat_4h_bb_pct_b(1.1061→0.8887,Δσ=0.6755), frozen_examples=feat_4h_ma_order(0.0/1), compressed_examples=feat_body(0.0/100)/feat_claw_intensity(0.003/21)/feat_ear(0.003/100), expected_static_examples=feat_4h_ma_order[discrete_regime_feature], overlay_only_examples=feat_claw[research_sparse_source]/feat_claw_intensity[research_sparse_source]/feat_fang_pcr[research_sparse_source], distinct_examples=feat_4h_ma_order(1/3)/feat_4h_dist_swing_high(0/0)/feat_chorus(0/0), null_examples=feat_4h_dist_swing_high(0.0)/feat_chorus(0.0)/feat_fin_netflow(0.0), recent_examples=2026-04-18 02:00:00.000000:0:bull:-0.2699/2026-04-18 02:56:16.458595:0:bull:-0.2983/2026-04-18 03:16:11.524145:0:bull:-0.2797, adverse_examples=2026-04-18 02:00:00.000000:0:bull:-0.2699/2026-04-18 02:56:16.458595:0:bull:-0.2983/2026-04-18 03:16:11.524145:0:bull:-0.2797

issues.title: live predictor decision-quality contract is runtime-blocked by recent pathology, a toxic exact live lane, or a severe narrowed pathology lane
issues.action: 把 hb_predict_probe 納入每輪 heartbeat 驗證，對 exact live lane、當前 calibration scope 與 worst narrowed scope 做 root-cause drill-down；優先檢查 exact lane 是否仍是 ALLOW 但 canonical true-negative share 已偏高，並交叉比對 recent same-scope / narrowed-scope 4H shifts、scope selection、與 execution guardrail 是否只是正確地把壞 pocket 擋下。 live_scope=global, regime=chop/CAUTION, label=D, sample_size=200, window=100, alerts=['constant_target'], expected_win_rate=0.0, expected_pnl=-0.01, expected_quality=-0.2877, layers=0→0, top_shifts=feat_4h_dist_bb_lower(3.8403→2.9907)/feat_4h_bb_pct_b(1.1061→0.8887)/feat_4h_dist_swing_low(5.387→5.2265), exact_live_lane=(rows=0,wr=None,q=None,dd=None,tuw=None), scope_matrix=regime_label+regime_gate+entry_quality_label:rows=0,wr=None,q=None,dd=None,tuw=None,alerts=['no_rows'];
